case_title: RETAILERS CREDIT ASSOCIATION OF SACRAMENTO vs. UY, ARTHUR Y.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RETAILERS CREDIT ASSOCIATION OF SACRAMENTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UY, ARTHUR Y. $6,448.28 PRINCIPAL, $6,192.12 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,663.40, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE # 044836 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RETAILERS CREDIT ASSOCIATION OF SACRAMENTO SERVED DEC-07-2000, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT UY, ARTHUR Y.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 1/12/01.
